With this design the kiri-spoon behaves like a pair of pliers: users squeeze the handles to change the shape of the utensil and enclose food morsels. In practice, users can apply this kiri-spoon as either a spoon (that scoops food) or as a fork (that pinches food); when the handles are closed, the utensil wraps around the morsel and prevents it from accidentally falling. We characterize the amount of force required to open or close the kiri-spoon, and show how designers can modify this force through kinematic or material changes. A highlight of our design is its accessibility: the hand-held version consists of just four 3D printed parts that snap together. By adding a servo motor, we can extend this same kinematic structure to robot-assisted feeding. Across our user studies, adults with disabilities and elderly adults with Parkinson's reported that the kiri-spoon better met their needs and provided a more effective means of spill prevention than existing alternatives. See a video of our kiri-spoon here: https://youtu.be/FFIomm5RL98

</details>


### [374] [Dynamic Targeting of Satellite Observations Using Supplemental Geostationary Satellite Data and Hierarchical Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06719)
*Akseli Kangaslahti,Itai Zilberstein,Alberto Candela,Steve Chien*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合地球静止卫星数据的分层规划方法，以增强动态目标观测（DT）任务的性能，显著提升科学产出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态目标观测（DT）任务受限于星上前瞻传感器的数据覆盖范围小、仪器机动性、数据吞吐量及星上计算能力等挑战，需引入更有效的前瞻信息源和规划策略。

Method: 引入地球静止卫星提供的长达35分钟的前瞻数据（远超星上传感器1分钟延迟），并设计分层规划方法：先用地球静止数据在多项式时间内生成长期观测蓝图，再用星上前瞻数据在短时域内精细化调整。

Result: 在四种任务场景（三种云规避变体和一种风暴追踪）中，所提分层规划器相较传统DT规划器最高提升性能41%；其优势在目标稀疏分布的动态场景中最显著。

Conclusion: 融合地球静止卫星数据并采用分层规划可有效克服DT任务的关键限制，显著提升观测效率与科学回报，尤其适用于目标时空分布稀疏且动态性强的任务。

Abstract: The Dynamic Targeting (DT) mission concept is an approach to satellite observation in which a lookahead sensor gathers information about the upcoming environment and uses this information to intelligently plan observations. Previous work has shown that DT has the potential to increase the science return across applications. However, DT mission concepts must address challenges, such as the limited spatial extent of onboard lookahead data and instrument mobility, data throughput, and onboard computation constraints. In this work, we show how the performance of DT systems can be improved by using supplementary data streamed from geostationary satellites that provide lookahead information up to 35 minutes ahead of time rather than the 1 minute latency from an onboard lookahead sensor. While there is a greater volume of geostationary data, the search space for observation planning explodes exponentially with the size of the horizon. To address this, we introduce a hierarchical planning approach in which the geostationary data is used to plan a long-term observation blueprint in polynomial time, then the onboard lookahead data is leveraged to refine that plan over short-term horizons. We compare the performance of our approach to that of traditional DT planners relying on onboard lookahead data across four different problem instances: three cloud avoidance variations and a storm hunting scenario. We show that our hierarchical planner outperforms the traditional DT planners by up to 41% and examine the features of the scenarios that affect the performance of our approach. We demonstrate that incorporating geostationary satellite data is most effective for dynamic problem instances in which the targets of interest are sparsely distributed throughout the overflight.

</details>


### [375] [Robotic Foundation Models for Industrial Control: A Comprehensive Survey and Readiness Assessment Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06749)
*David Kube,Simon Hadwiger,Tobias Meisen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了机器人基础模型（RFMs）在工业应用中的现状与挑战，提出包含149项具体标准的评估框架，并对324个具备操作能力的RFMs进行大规模评估，发现当前模型工业成熟度普遍较低，亟需系统性整合安全性、实时性、鲁棒感知、人机交互及低成本系统集成等要素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺乏对机器人基础模型（RFMs）工业适用性的深入考察，尤其在协作机器人、异构感知与执行、边缘计算约束和安全关键运行等实际工业场景下的需求尚未被系统分析。

Method: 构建基于11项工业部署启示的评估框架，涵盖149项具体能力与生态要求标准；采用保守的LLM辅助评估流程，对324个操作型RFMs进行48,276次细粒度判定，并经专家验证。

Result: 评估显示当前RFMs工业成熟度有限且不均衡：最高分模型仅满足部分标准，且多呈现特定维度上的孤立优势，缺乏综合覆盖能力。

Conclusion: 迈向工业级RFMs的关键不在于孤立基准表现，而在于将安全性、实时可行性、鲁棒感知、人机交互和低成本系统集成等要素系统性融入可审计的部署栈中。

Abstract: Robotic foundation models (RFMs) are emerging as a promising route towards flexible, instruction- and demonstration-driven robot control, however, a critical investigation of their industrial applicability is still lacking. This survey gives an extensive overview over the RFM-landscape and analyses, driven by concrete implications, how industrial domains and use cases shape the requirements of RFMs, with particular focus on collaborative robot platforms, heterogeneous sensing and actuation, edge-computing constraints, and safety-critical operation. We synthesise industrial deployment perspectives into eleven interdependent implications and operationalise them into an assessment framework comprising a catalogue of 149 concrete criteria, spanning both model capabilities and ecosystem requirements. Using this framework, we evaluate 324 manipulation-capable RFMs via 48,276 criterion-level decisions obtained via a conservative LLM-assisted evaluation pipeline, validated against expert judgements. The results indicate that industrial maturity is limited and uneven: even the highest-rated models satisfy only a fraction of criteria and typically exhibit narrow implication-specific peaks rather than integrated coverage. We conclude that progress towards industry-grade RFMs depends less on isolated benchmark successes than on systematic incorporation of safety, real-time feasibility, robust perception, interaction, and cost-effective system integration into auditable deployment stacks.

</details>


### [376] [Gradient-based Nested Co-Design of Aerodynamic Shape and Control for Winged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06760)
*Daniele Affinita,Mingda Xu,Benoît Valentin Gherardi,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用的、基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架，联合优化固定翼滑翔机的气动外形与运动规划器，利用神经代理模型表征复杂亚音速气动力，显著提升 perch 和短距着陆等动态任务性能，并大幅减少计算时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统先设计形状再设计运动规划器的串行方法在宽飞行包线任务中因二者强非线性耦合而次优，亟需能联合优化气动外形与运动规划的协同设计方法。

Method: 提出一种梯度驱动的嵌套协同设计框架：外层优化气动外形参数，内层由最优控制运动规划器求解轨迹，其动力学模型中的气动力由训练好的神经网络代理模型提供，以准确刻画复杂亚音速流场。

Result: 在固定翼滑翔机的 perching 和短距着陆两个复杂动态任务上验证了方法有效性；相比进化算法基线，优化设计显著提升任务性能，且计算耗时大幅降低。

Conclusion: 该基于神经代理与梯度优化的协同设计框架突破了现有方法对气动或规划模块的简化假设限制，为宽包线空中机器人设计提供了更通用、高效、高保真的解决方案。

Abstract: Designing aerial robots for specialized tasks, from perching to payload delivery, requires tailoring their aerodynamic shape to specific mission requirements. For tasks involving wide flight envelopes, the usual sequential process of first determining the shape and then the motion planner is likely to be suboptimal due to the inherent nonlinear interactions between them. This limitation has been motivating co-design research, which involves jointly optimizing the aerodynamic shape and the motion planner. In this paper, we present a general-purpose, gradient-based, nested co-design framework where the motion planner solves an optimal control problem and the aerodynamic forces used in the dynamics model are determined by a neural surrogate model. This enables us to model complex subsonic flow conditions encountered in aerial robotics and to overcome the limited applicability of existing co-design methods. These limitations stem from the simplifying assumptions they require for computational tractability to either the planner or the aerodynamics. We validate our method on two complex dynamic tasks for fixed-wing gliders: perching and a short landing. Our optimized designs improve task performance compared to an evolutionary baseline in a fraction of the computation time.

</details>


### [377] [Stability-Guided Exploration for Diverse Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06773)
*Eckart Cobo-Briesewitz,Tilman Burghoff,Denis Shcherba,Armand Jordana,Marc Toussaint*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合RRT式搜索与基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）的新方法，通过在黑盒仿真中引导探索稳定状态流形，生成多样化的长时程机器人操作策略，无需任务特定指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据收集是机器人学习的瓶颈，人类示范数据劳动密集、狭窄且探索不充分；现有合成数据方法多样性不足。

Method: 结合RRT-style搜索与采样型MPC，并设计一种新型采样策略，在仿真中直接沿稳定状态流形采样以引导树生长，不限制运动必须全程稳定。

Result: 在多种机器人形态上成功生成包括推、抓、旋转、投掷和工具使用在内的多样化长时程操作策略，无需任务特定引导。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效提升合成数据的多样性与实用性，为机器人学习提供更广覆盖的状态空间探索能力。

Abstract: Scaling up datasets is highly effective in improving the performance of deep learning models, including in the field of robot learning. However, data collection still proves to be a bottleneck. Approaches relying on collecting human demonstrations are labor-intensive and inherently limited: they tend to be narrow, task-specific, and fail to adequately explore the full space of feasible states. Synthetic data generation could remedy this, but current techniques mostly rely on local trajectory optimization and fail to find diverse solutions. In this work, we propose a novel method capable of finding diverse long-horizon manipulations through black-box simulation. We achieve this by combining an RRT-style search with sampling-based MPC, together with a novel sampling scheme that guides the exploration toward stable configurations. Specifically, we sample from a manifold of stable states while growing a search tree directly through simulation, without restricting the planner to purely stable motions. We demonstrate the method's ability to discover diverse manipulation strategies, including pushing, grasping, pivoting, throwing, and tool use, across different robot morphologies, without task-specific guidance.

</details>


### [378] [HybridMimic: Hybrid RL-Centroidal Control for Humanoid Motion Mimicking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06775)
*Ludwig Chee-Ying Tay,I-Chia Chang,Yan Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: This paper proposes HybridMimic, a hybrid RL-control framework for humanoid robots that combines learned policies with centroidal-model-based control to improve physical feasibility and robustness in out-of-distribution environments.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Standard RL policies for humanoid locomotion often ignore robot dynamics during deployment, leading to physically infeasible actions in unseen environments; existing hybrid methods are limited by reliance on predefined contact timing.

Method: HybridMimic integrates a learned policy that dynamically predicts continuous contact states and desired centroidal velocities to modulate a centroidal-model-based controller, using physics-informed rewards to train the policy for precise target generation and torque reference.

Result: On the Booster T1 humanoid robot, HybridMimic reduces average base position tracking error by 13% compared to a state-of-the-art RL baseline, validating improved robustness under domain shift.

Conclusion: Dynamics-aware, hybrid architectures—particularly those enabling learned, continuous contact modulation of model-based controllers—enhance physical feasibility and deployment robustness for humanoid RL policies.

Abstract: Motion mimicking, i.e., encouraging the control policy to mimic human motion, facilitates the learning of complex tasks via reinforcement learning (RL) for humanoid robots. Although standard RL frameworks demonstrate impressive locomotion agility, they often bypass explicit reasoning about robot dynamics during deployment, which is a design choice that can lead to physically infeasible commands when the robot encounters out-of-distribution environments. By integrating model-based principles, hybrid approaches can improve performance; however, existing methods typically rely on predefined contact timing, limiting their versatility. This paper introduces HybridMimic, a framework in which a learned policy dynamically modulates a centroidal-model-based controller by predicting continuous contact states and desired centroidal velocities. This architecture exploits the physical grounding of centroidal dynamics to generate feedforward torques that remain feasible even under domain shift. Using physics-informed rewards, the policy is trained to efficiently utilize the centroidal controller's optimization by outputting precise control targets and reference torques. Through hardware experiments on the Booster T1 humanoid, HybridMimic reduces the average base position tracking error by 13\% compared to a state-of-the-art RL baseline, demonstrating the robustness of dynamics-aware deployment.

</details>


### [379] [A Multi-Layer Sim-to-Real Framework for Gaze-Driven Assistive Neck Exoskeletons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06779)
*Colin Rubow,Eric Brewer,Ian Bales,Haohan Zhang,Daniel S. Brown*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）采集眼动与头动耦合数据的方法，训练仅依赖眼动预测头动的模型，并设计了多层控制器选择框架，在仿真、VR和物理外骨骼逐级验证，最终实现了个性化、直观且安全的眼动驱动颈部助力外骨骼控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决因神经系统疾病导致的低头综合征患者头部运动障碍问题，关键挑战在于准确预测用户意图性头部运动。

Method: 利用VR采集健康人眼动与头动同步数据，训练眼动到头动的预测模型；提出多层控制器选择框架，依次在仿真、VR和物理颈部外骨骼上评估不同控制策略。

Result: 筛选出两个新型眼动驱动模型，在物理外骨骼上表现出强性能；发现无单一最优控制器，强调个性化控制的必要性。

Conclusion: VR可用于加速开发直观、安全、个性化的辅助机器人，眼动驱动是实现自然头部助力的有效途径，个性化控制器选择至关重要。

Abstract: Dropped head syndrome, caused by neck muscle weakness from neurological diseases, severely impairs an individual's ability to support and move their head, causing pain and making everyday tasks challenging. Our long-term goal is to develop an assistive powered neck exoskeleton that restores natural movement. However, predicting a user's intended head movement remains a key challenge. We leverage virtual reality (VR) to collect coupled eye and head movement data from healthy individuals to train models capable of predicting head movement based solely on eye gaze. We also propose a novel multi-layer controller selection framework, where head control strategies are evaluated across decreasing levels of abstraction -- from simulation and VR to a physical neck exoskeleton. This pipeline effectively rejects poor-performing controllers early, identifying two novel gaze-driven models that achieve strong performance when deployed on the physical exoskeleton. Our results reveal that no single controller is universally preferred, highlighting the necessity for personalization in gaze-driven assistive control. Our work demonstrates the utility of VR-based evaluation for accelerating the development of intuitive, safe, and personalized assistive robots.

</details>


### [380] [Less is More: Robust Zero-Communication 3D Pursuit-Evasion via Representational Parsimony](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08273)
*Jialin Ying,Zhihao Li,Zicheng Dong,Guohua Wu,Yihuan Liao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向鲁棒性的去中心化多智能体强化学习方法，通过简化观测表示（83维降至50维）和设计局部感知的贡献门控信用分配机制（CGCA），在通信受限、存在延迟与部分可观测的三维追逃任务中显著提升了成功率与抗干扰能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在通信延迟、部分可观测和非完整运动约束下，不对称三维追逃任务面临严峻挑战；现有MARL方法依赖强智能体耦合或中心化信号，在通信受损时易失效；因此需探索无通信条件下的鲁棒协调机制。

Method: 基于路径引导的去中心化追捕框架，提出两个核心设计：(i) 简约化Actor观测接口（移除团队耦合通道，维度从83D降至50D）；(ii) 贡献门控信用分配（CGCA），一种面向通信中断场景的局部性信用分配机制。

Result: 在4追者vs1逃者的Stage-5评测中，成功率达0.753±0.091（优于基线0.721±0.071），碰撞率降至0.223±0.066（优于基线0.253±0.089）；在速度/偏航/噪声/延迟压力测试中表现优雅退化，并在城市峡谷地图实现约61%零样本迁移成功率（密度0.24）。

Conclusion: 显式切断冗余跨智能体通道可抑制误差级联，提升部署鲁棒性，支持向‘通信无关、表征简约’的实用多智能体范式转变。

Abstract: Asymmetric 3D pursuit-evasion in cluttered voxel environments is difficult under communication latency, partial observability, and nonholonomic maneuver limits. While many MARL methods rely on richer inter-agent coupling or centralized signals, these dependencies can become fragility sources when communication is delayed or noisy. Building on an inherited path-guided decentralized pursuit scaffold, we study a robustness-oriented question: can representational parsimony improve communication-free coordination? We instantiate this principle with (i) a parsimonious actor observation interface that removes team-coupled channels (83-D to 50-D), and (ii) Contribution-Gated Credit Assignment (CGCA), a locality-aware credit structure for communication-denied cooperation. In Stage-5 evaluation (4 pursuers vs. 1 evader), our configuration reaches 0.753 +/- 0.091 success and 0.223 +/- 0.066 collision, outperforming the 83-D FULL OBS counterpart (0.721 +/- 0.071, 0.253 +/- 0.089). It further shows graceful degradation under speed/yaw/noise/delay stress tests and resilient zero-shot transfer on urban-canyon maps (about 61% success at density 0.24). These results support a practical paradigm shift: explicitly severing redundant cross-agent channels can suppress compounding error cascades and improve robustness in latency-prone deployment.

</details>


### [381] [A Comprehensive Analysis of the Effects of Network Quality of Service on Robotic Telesurgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06824)
*Zhaomeng Zhang,Seyed Hamid Reza Roodabeh,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出NetFI故障注入工具，结合手术模拟平台与用户研究，定量分析网络QoS（丢包、延迟、通信中断）对远程手术任务执行的影响，识别易受干扰的运动基元，并揭示操作者熟练度、客观表现与主观工作负荷间的强相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长距离远程手术的可行性依赖于可靠的网络服务质量（QoS），但现实网络退化对任务执行影响尚缺乏充分理解。

Method: 开发基于真实网络数据的随机QoS建模的故障注入工具NetFI，集成至手术模拟平台；开展含15名不同熟练度参与者的用户研究，执行标准Peg Transfer任务；结合客观性能/安全指标、细粒度运动基元分析及主观工作负荷评估进行多维分析。

Result: 识别出特定易受网络退化影响的运动基元；发现操作者熟练度、客观任务表现与主观工作负荷之间存在强相关性；量化了远程手术的实际运行边界。

Conclusion: 本研究为远程手术系统设计提供了关键定量依据；开源工具与标注数据集可支撑鲁棒、网络感知的控制与缓解策略研发。

Abstract: The viability of long-distance telesurgery hinges on reliable network Quality of Service (QoS), yet the impact of realistic network degradations on task performance is not sufficiently understood. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of how packet loss, delay, and communication loss affect telesurgical task execution. We introduce NetFI, a novel fault injection tool that emulates different network conditions using stochastic QoS models informed by real-world network data. By integrating NetFI with a surgical simulation platform, we conduct a user study involving 15 participants at three proficiency levels, performing a standardized Peg Transfer task under varying levels of packet loss, delay, and communication loss. We analyze the effect of network QoS on overall task performance and the fine-grained motion primitives (MPs) using objective performance and safety metrics and subjective operator's perception of workload. We identify specific MPs vulnerable to network degradation and find strong correlations between proficiency, objective performance, and subjective workload. These findings offer quantitative insights into the operational boundaries of telesurgery. Our open-source tools and annotated dataset provide a foundation for developing robust and network-aware control and mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [382] [Learning-Based Robust Control: Unifying Exploration and Distributional Robustness for Reliable Robotics via Free Energy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06831)
*Hozefa Jesawada,Giovanni Russo,Abdalla Swikir,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于分布鲁棒自由能原理的策略计算模型，联合学习环境动力学和奖励，并保证对认知不确定性的鲁棒性，在仿真与真实机器人实验中均验证了其有效性，缩小了仿真到现实的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠机器人控制的关键挑战在于设计既能学习策略又能保证部署鲁棒性的计算模型。

Method: 受计算神经科学中自由能原理启发，提出一种基于分布鲁棒自由能原理的策略计算模型，改进最大扩散学习框架，联合学习环境动力学与奖励。

Result: 在连续控制基准任务、仿真及Franka Research 3机械臂真实操作实验中验证了方法有效性；显著缩小sim-to-real差距，实现无需任务微调的可重复桌面操作。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过显式建模并保障对环境与奖励中认知不确定性的鲁棒性，实现了更可靠、泛化更强的机器人控制策略。

Abstract: A key challenge towards reliable robotic control is devising computational models that can both learn policies and guarantee robustness when deployed in the field. Inspired by the free energy principle in computational neuroscience, to address these challenges, we propose a model for policy computation that jointly learns environment dynamics and rewards, while ensuring robustness to epistemic uncertainties. Expounding a distributionally robust free energy principle, we propose a modification to the maximum diffusion learning framework. After explicitly characterizing robustness of our policies to epistemic uncertainties in both environment and reward, we validate their effectiveness on continuous-control benchmarks, via both simulations and real-world experiments involving manipulation with a Franka Research~3 arm. Across simulation and zero-shot deployment, our approach narrows the sim-to-real gap, and enables repeatable tabletop manipulation without task-specific fine-tuning.

</details>


### [383] [Receding-Horizon Nullspace Optimization for Actuation-Aware Control Allocation in Omnidirectional UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06832)
*Riccardo Pretto,Mahmoud Hamandi,Abdullah Mohamed Ali,Gokhan Alcan,Anthony Tzes,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向全驱动全向无人机的、考虑执行器非对称动力学的滚动时域控制分配方法，通过前向仿真与零空间优化，在保证期望机体广义力精确实现的同时抑制电机指令振荡，提升轨迹跟踪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统控制分配方法忽略机载执行器的非对称动力学，导致电机指令振荡、动态机动中轨迹跟踪性能下降。

Method: 提出一种基于滚动时域的、执行器感知的分配策略，显式建模电机非对称动力学，并利用过驱动平台冗余性进行零空间优化；通过闭环系统前向仿真预测并抑制振荡；在线求解约束最优控制问题（采用约束迭代LQR）。

Result: 在OmniOcta平台上仿真表明，相比传统单步二次规划分配器，所提方法显著降低电机指令振荡，提升位置与姿态轨迹跟踪精度。

Conclusion: 执行器动力学建模与滚动时域优化相结合的分配策略，可有效提升全驱动无人机在高动态任务中的控制品质与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Fully actuated omnidirectional UAVs enable independent control of forces and torques along all six degrees of freedom, broadening the operational envelope for agile flight and aerial interaction tasks. However, conventional control allocation methods neglect the asymmetric dynamics of the onboard actuators, which can induce oscillatory motor commands and degrade trajectory tracking during dynamic maneuvers. This work proposes a receding-horizon, actuation-aware allocation strategy that explicitly incorporates asymmetric motor dynamics and exploits the redundancy of over-actuated platforms through nullspace optimization. By forward-simulating the closed-loop system over a prediction horizon, the method anticipates actuator-induced oscillations and suppresses them through smooth redistribution of motor commands, while preserving the desired body wrench exactly. The approach is formulated as a constrained optimal control problem solved online via Constrained iterative LQR. Simulation results on the OmniOcta platform demonstrate that the proposed method significantly reduces motor command oscillations compared to a conventional single-step quadratic programming allocator, yielding improved trajectory tracking in both position and orientation.

</details>


### [384] [RoboCritics: Enabling Reliable End-to-End LLM Robot Programming through Expert-Informed Critics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06842)
*Callie Y. Kim,Nathan Thomas White,Evan He,Frederic Sala,Bilge Mutlu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RoboCritics，一种结合专家运动级批评器的LLM机器人编程方法，通过检测运动轨迹中的安全问题并提供透明反馈和一键修复，提升 novice 用户编程的安全性与可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的机器人编程生成“黑盒”代码，难以验证与调试，带来物理系统中的安全与可靠性风险；而初学者又缺乏专业机器人知识，亟需更安全、可理解、用户可控的编程方式。

Method: 提出RoboCritics框架，在LLM生成代码后，引入基于机器人专业知识的运动级批评器（critics），实时分析执行轨迹（如关节速度超限、碰撞、末端位姿不安全等）；发现问题时向用户提供可解释反馈和一键修复，并将结构化信息回传LLM以支持迭代优化；实现为Web界面并连接UR3e机械臂。

Result: 在18人被试的对照实验中，相比纯LLM基线，RoboCritics显著减少了安全违规、提升了执行质量，并改变了用户验证与优化程序的方式。

Conclusion: RoboCritics实现了更可靠、以用户为中心的端到端LLM机器人编程，弥合了自然语言接口与物理世界安全需求之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: End-user robot programming grants users the flexibility to re-task robots in situ, yet it remains challenging for novices due to the need for specialized robotics knowledge. Large Language Models (LLMs) hold the potential to lower the barrier to robot programming by enabling task specification through natural language. However, current LLM-based approaches generate opaque, "black-box" code that is difficult to verify or debug, creating tangible safety and reliability risks in physical systems. We present RoboCritics, an approach that augments LLM-based robot programming with expert-informed motion-level critics. These critics encode robotics expertise to analyze motion-level execution traces for issues such as joint speed violations, collisions, and unsafe end-effector poses. When violations are detected, critics surface transparent feedback and offer one-click fixes that forward structured messages back to the LLM, enabling iterative refinement while keeping users in the loop. We instantiated RoboCritics in a web-based interface connected to a UR3e robot and evaluated it in a between-subjects user study (n=18). Compared to a baseline LLM interface, RoboCritics reduced safety violations, improved execution quality, and shaped how participants verified and refined their programs. Our findings demonstrate that RoboCritics enables more reliable and user-centered end-to-end robot programming with LLMs.

</details>


### [385] [Nonlinear Performance Degradation of Vision-Based Teleoperation under Network Latency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06850)
*Aws Khalil,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了网络延迟对基于视觉的自动驾驶车辆远程操作中车道保持控制稳定性的影响，发现150-225ms单向感知延迟会导致系统稳定性急剧下降，并提出了一个用于精确延迟测量与注入的ROS 2测试平台LAVT。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络延迟对视觉驱动的远程操作控制影响尚缺乏充分研究，尤其在闭环稳定性方面。

Method: 构建了Latency-Aware Vision Teleoperation（LAVT）测试平台，基于ROS 2实现精确单向延迟测量与可控延迟注入，并在仿真中开展180组闭环实验，覆盖多种道路几何场景。

Result: 发现150–225ms单向感知延迟区间内，路线完成率从100%骤降至50%以下，伴随振荡失稳与相位滞后；控制通道延迟会进一步加剧失稳。

Conclusion: 该工作定量揭示了感知延迟引发的闭环不稳定性机制，提供了可复现的基准，为后续延迟补偿与预测控制策略奠定基础。

Abstract: Teleoperation is increasingly being adopted as a critical fallback for autonomous vehicles. However, the impact of network latency on vision-based, perception-driven control remains insufficiently studied. The present work investigates the nonlinear degradation of closed-loop stability in camera-based lane keeping under varying network delays. To conduct this study, we developed the Latency-Aware Vision Teleoperation testbed (LAVT), a research-oriented ROS 2 framework that enables precise, distributed one-way latency measurement and reproducible delay injection. Using LAVT, we performed 180 closed-loop experiments in simulation across diverse road geometries. Our findings reveal a sharp collapse in stability between 150 ms and 225 ms of one-way perception latency, where route completion rates drop from 100% to below 50% as oscillatory instability and phase-lag effects emerge. We further demonstrate that additional control-channel delay compounds these effects, significantly accelerating system failure even under constant visual latency. By combining this systematic empirical characterization with the LAVT testbed, this work provides quantitative insights into perception-driven instability and establishes a reproducible baseline for future latency-compensation and predictive control strategies. Project page, supplementary video, and code are available at https://bimilab.github.io/paper-LAVT

</details>


### [386] [Robodimm: A Physics-Grounded Framework for Automated Actuator Sizing in Scalable Modular Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06864)
*J. L. Torres,M. Munoz,J. D. Alvarez,J. L. Blanco,A. Gimenez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Robodimm软件框架，用于模块化机器人中自动选择电机-减速器组合，通过KKT约束逆动力学方法、参数化缩放与两轮验证流程，解决闭链机构中力矩耦合与惯性传播问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在模块化机器人（尤其是含闭链机构）中，电机-减速器选型困难，因关节力矩耦合且执行器惯性在机构中传播，影响成本、质量与动态性能。

Method: 基于Pinocchio动力学库和Pink逆运动学库，采用Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 构建约束逆动力学模型；支持参数化缩放、交互式轨迹编程（jog模式）及考虑执行器自重的两轮验证流程。

Result: 实现了Robodimm自动化执行器尺寸设计框架，可处理可扩展机器人架构中的复杂耦合动力学问题。

Conclusion: Robodimm为模块化闭链机器人提供了高效、鲁棒的执行器选型工具，提升了设计自动化水平与工程实用性。

Abstract: Selecting an appropriate motor-gearbox combination is a critical design task in robotics because it directly affects cost, mass, and dynamic performance. This process is especially challenging in modular robots with closed kinematic chains, where joint torques are coupled and actuator inertia propagates through the mechanism. We present Robodimm, a software framework for automated actuator sizing in scalable robot architectures. By leveraging Pinocchio for dynamics and Pink for inverse kinematics, Robodimm uses a Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) formulation for constrained inverse dynamics. The platform supports parametric scaling, interactive trajectory programming through jog modes, and a two-round validation workflow that addresses actuator self-weight effects.

</details>


### [387] [CAR: Cross-Vehicle Kinodynamics Adaptation via Mobility Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06866)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CAR框架，通过Transformer编码器和自适应层归一化，将车辆轨迹与物理配置嵌入共享运动潜空间，实现跨平台运动学动力学知识的快速迁移，仅需1分钟新数据即可显著降低预测误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主越野移动开发依赖大量平台特定数据或简化运动学模型，难以扩展到异构机器人车队。

Method: 提出CAR框架，采用带自适应层归一化的Transformer编码器构建共享运动潜空间，并基于最近邻提取共性以实现新平台的快速运动学动力学适配。

Result: 在Verti-Bench仿真器及Verti-4-Wheeler四种物理构型上验证，仅用1分钟新轨迹数据，预测误差较直接邻居迁移降低最多67.2%。

Conclusion: CAR实现了低数据、低计算开销下的跨车辆运动知识迁移，有效提升异构机器人车队的可扩展性。

Abstract: Developing autonomous off-road mobility typically requires either extensive, platform-specific data collection or relies on simplified abstractions, such as unicycle or bicycle models, that fail to capture the complex kinodynamics of diverse platforms, ranging from wheeled to tracked vehicles. This limitation hinders scalability across evolving heterogeneous autonomous robot fleets. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-vehicle kinodynamics Adaptation via mobility Representation (CAR), a novel framework that enables rapid mobility transfer to new vehicles. CAR employs a Transformer encoder with Adaptive Layer Normalization to embed vehicle trajectory transitions and physical configurations into a shared mobility latent space. By identifying and extracting commonality from nearest neighbors within this latent space, our approach enables rapid kinodynamics adaptation to novel platforms with minimal data collection and computational overhead. We evaluate CAR using the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance on four distinct physical configurations of the Verti-4-Wheeler platform. With only one minute of new trajectory data, CAR achieves up to 67.2% reduction in prediction error compared to direct neighbor transfer across diverse unseen vehicle configurations, demonstrating the effectiveness of cross-vehicle mobility knowledge transfer in both simulated and real-world environments.

</details>


### [388] [Material Driven HRI Design: Aesthetics as Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06879)
*Natalie Friedman,Kevin Weatherwax,Chengchao Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文探讨了机器人外观设计（尤其是美学）如何影响用户对其功能和角色的理解，提出将时尚设计原则应用于机器人设计，使颜色、纹理和材料选择成为交互信号，以引导用户期望并提升可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人设计常忽视美学对用户理解其角色的影响，现有设计多采用隐藏机械结构的工业风格，导致用户基于虚构或非虚构媒体自行赋予意义，易产生错误预期。

Method: 提出一个框架，将材料特性视为传递交互、任务与环境预期的信号，并通过内容分析法对6款机器人进行案例研究。

Result: 验证了材料选择可作为有效的交互信号，能提升机器人行为的可解释性与用户期望一致性；不当设计则易引发误解。

Conclusion: 机器人外观不应仅是装饰，而应被视作功能性交互界面的一部分；借鉴时尚设计思维有助于提升人机交互的熟悉感、可读性与可解释性。

Abstract: Aesthetics - often treated as secondary to function-guides how people interpret robots' roles. A great deal of robot designs - both real and fictitious - use sleek industrial aesthetics. These feature hard glossy plastics, hiding as much of the underlying mechanical and electrical components as possible, resembling something akin to a nude humanoid figure. This leaves robots as something of a blank slate to which end-users apply coverings to, often based on media of fiction and non-fiction alike. We argue that designers can take cues from fashion to design interaction and set appropriate expectations. Rather than viewing appearance as decoration, we propose that color, texture, and material choices function as interaction signals. These signals can invite or discourage touch, clarify a robot's role, and help align user expectations with a robot's actual capabilities. When done thoughtfully, such cues can create familiarity and legibility; when done poorly, they can lead to wrong expectations. This preliminary paper proposes a framework describing how materials can create explainability by signaling expectations for interaction, task, and environment. We use this framework to do a content analysis of 6 robots.

</details>


### [389] [VertiAdaptor: Online Kinodynamics Adaptation for Vertically Challenging Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06887)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Aniket Datar,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VertiAdaptor（VA），一种结合高程与语义嵌入的在线自适应框架，通过神经常微分方程基函数建模车辆-地形动力学，在离线训练后仅需最小二乘即可快速适配新地形，显著提升预测精度（+23.9%）与适应速度（5倍）


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统运动学-动力学模型难以在多变非结构化越野地形中泛化，亟需实时自适应能力以保障导航安全可靠

Method: VertiAdaptor（VA）利用函数编码器融合高程与语义嵌入，构建由神经常微分方程基函数张成的运动学-动力学空间，并通过高效最小二乘法实现新环境下的在线参数辨识与适应

Result: 在Verti-Bench仿真平台及Verti-4-Wheeler实车平台上验证，VA预测精度最高提升23.9%，适应时间加快5倍

Conclusion: VA有效提升了越野环境下自主机器人对复杂、动态地形的建模与规划鲁棒性与可靠性

Abstract: Autonomous driving in off-road environments presents significant challenges due to the dynamic and unpredictable nature of unstructured terrain. Traditional kinodynamic models often struggle to generalize across diverse geometric and semantic terrain types, underscoring the need for real-time adaptation to ensure safe and reliable navigation. We propose VertiAdaptor (VA), a novel online adaptation framework that efficiently integrates elevation with semantic embeddings to enable terrain-aware kinodynamic modeling and planning via function encoders. VA learns a kinodynamic space spanned by a set of neural ordinary differential equation basis functions, capturing complex vehicle-terrain interactions across varied environments. After offline training, the proposed approach can rapidly adapt to new, unseen environments by identifying kinodynamics in the learned space through a computationally efficient least-squares calculation. We evaluate VA within the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance both in simulation and on a physical Verti-4-Wheeler platform. Our results demonstrate that VA improves prediction accuracy by up to 23.9% and achieves a 5X faster adaptation time, advancing the robustness and reliability of autonomous robots in complex and evolving off-road environments.

</details>


### [390] [Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization for Operationally Constrained UAV-UGV Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06898)
*Zihao Deng,Qianhuang Li,Peng Gao,Maggie Wigness,John Rogers,Donghyun Kim,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CoPCS的学习型协同规划方法，用于解决多无人机（UAV）与多无人地面车（UGV）在能量和地形约束下的同步并发协同规划问题，支持任务分配、路径规划与及时在轨充电协调，并通过仿真与实物实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异构机器人团队在复杂现实任务中需协同规划，但UAV续航短、UGV受地形限制，单独无法完成如环境监测等任务，亟需能兼顾能量约束、可通行性约束及任务同步的协同规划方法。

Method: 提出CoPCS框架：采用异构图变换器编码操作约束下的任务信息，结合变换器解码器实现UAV与UGV的联合、同步并发协同规划；端到端基于模仿学习训练。

Result: 在仿真与真实机器人平台上验证了CoPCS能实现同步并发协同规划能力，显著提升异构机器人团队整体性能。

Conclusion: CoPCS首次实现了能量与地形双重约束下多UAV-UGV系统的同步并发协同规划，为异构机器人协作提供了可扩展、可学习的新范式。

Abstract: Collaborative planning under operational constraints is an essential capability for heterogeneous robot teams tackling complex large-scale real-world tasks. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) offer rapid environmental coverage, but flight time is often limited by energy constraints, whereas Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) have greater energy capacity to support long-duration missions, but movement is constrained by traversable terrain. Individually, neither can complete tasks such as environmental monitoring. Effective UAV-UGV collaboration therefore requires energy-constrained multi-UAV task planning, traversability-constrained multi-UGV path planning, and crucially, synchronized concurrent co-planning to ensure timely in-mission recharging. To enable these capabilities, we propose Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization (CoPCS), a learning-based approach that integrates a heterogeneous graph transformer for operationally constrained task encoding with a transformer decoder for joint, synchronized co-planning that enables UAVs and UGVs to act concurrently in a coordinated manner. CoPCS is trained end-to-end under a unified imitation learning paradigm. We conducted extensive experiments to evaluate CoPCS in both robotic simulations and physical robot teams. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides the novel multi-robot capability of synchronized concurrent co-planning and substantially improves team performance. More details of this work are available on the project website: https://hcrlab.gitlab.io/project/CoPCS.

</details>


### [391] [SysNav: Multi-Level Systematic Cooperation Enables Real-World, Cross-Embodiment Object Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06914)
*Haokun Zhu,Zongtai Li,Zihan Liu,Kevin Guo,Zhengzhi Lin,Yuxin Cai,Guofei Chen,Chen Lv,Wenshan Wang,Jean Oh,Ji Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了SysNav，一个用于真实世界物体导航（ObjectNav）的三层系统，通过解耦语义推理、导航规划与运动控制，结合视觉语言模型（VLM）实现跨形态机器人在复杂环境中的高效、鲁棒导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界物体导航面临空间结构复杂、长程规划困难和语义理解需求等多重挑战，而现有VLM难以有效融入实际导航系统。

Method: 提出SysNav三层次系统：高层用VLM构建结构化场景表示并提供语义导航指导；中层采用基于房间的分层导航策略，仅在房间级决策中调用VLM以兼顾效率与能力；低层由各形态专属运动控制模块执行路径点。系统部署于三种实体机器人并开展190次真实实验。

Result: 在真实世界建筑尺度长距离导航任务中显著提升成功率与导航效率；在四个仿真基准上达到SOTA性能；是首个能在复杂真实环境中可靠高效完成大范围ObjectNav的系统。

Conclusion: SysNav验证了将VLM作为高层语义控制器、分层解耦设计对提升真实世界导航鲁棒性与泛化性的有效性，为跨形态具身智能系统提供了可扩展架构。

Abstract: Object navigation (ObjectNav) in real-world environments is a complex problem that requires simultaneously addressing multiple challenges, including complex spatial structure, long-horizon planning and semantic understanding. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer promising capabilities for semantic understanding, yet effectively integrating them into real-world navigation systems remains a non-trivial challenge. In this work, we formulate real-world ObjectNav as a system-level problem and introduce SysNav, a three-level ObjectNav system designed for real-world crossembodiment deployment. SysNav decouples semantic reasoning, navigation planning and motion control to ensure robustness and generalizability. At the high-level, we summarize the environment into a structured scene representation and leverage VLMs to provide semantic-grounded navigation guidance. At the mid-level, we introduce a hierarchical room-based navigation strategy that reserves VLM guidance for room-level decisions, which effectively utilizes its reasoning ability while ensuring system efficiency. At the low-level, planned waypoints are executed through different embodiment-specific motion control modules. We deploy our system on three embodiments, a custom-built wheeled robot, the Unitree Go2 quadruped and the Unitree G1 humanoid, and conduct 190 real-world experiments. Our system achieves substantial improvements in both success rate and navigation efficiency. To the best of our knowledge, SysNav is the first system capable of reliably and efficiently completing building-scale long-range object navigation in complex real-world environments. Furthermore, extensive experiments on four simulation benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Project page is available at: https://cmu-vln.github.io/.

</details>


### [392] [T2Nav Algebraic Topology Aware Temporal Graph Memory and Loop Detection for ZeroShot Visual Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06918)
*Quang-Anh N. D.,Duc Pham,Minh-Anh Nguyen,Tung Doan,Tuan Dang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出T2Nav，一种零样本导航系统，通过整合异构数据和基于图的推理，实现无需额外训练即可在未知环境中进行视觉实例导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统导航学习方法需要大量数据、持续调优甚至重头训练，难以扩展和灵活应对新任务；现有基于基础模型的方法受限于输入类型、推理能力弱、未能充分利用观测细节和空间结构。

Method: T2Nav将视觉信息直接融入图结构中，并与环境匹配，结合异构数据输入与图推理，支持以目标物体参考图像为导航目标的零样本设置。

Result: 系统实现了稳健的避障、可靠的闭环检测、高效路径规划，并消除了冗余探索；在未知环境中表现出良好适应性和效率，尤其适用于导航至视觉相似但空间位置不同的物体实例。

Conclusion: T2Nav推动了实用化零样本实例图像导航的发展，提升了自主智能体在现实世界中的灵活性与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Deploying autonomous agents in real world environments is challenging, particularly for navigation, where systems must adapt to situations they have not encountered before. Traditional learning approaches require substantial amounts of data, constant tuning, and, sometimes, starting over for each new task. That makes them hard to scale and not very flexible. Recent breakthroughs in foundation models, such as large language models and vision language models, enable systems to attempt new navigation tasks without requiring additional training. However, many of these methods only work with specific input types, employ relatively basic reasoning, and fail to fully exploit the details they observe or the structure of the spaces. Here, we introduce T2Nav, a zeroshot navigation system that integrates heterogeneous data and employs graph-based reasoning. By directly incorporating visual information into the graph and matching it to the environment, our approach enables the system to strike a good balance between exploration and goal attainment. This strategy allows robust obstacle avoidance, reliable loop closure detection, and efficient path planning while eliminating redundant exploration patterns. The system demonstrates flexibility by handling goals specified using reference images of target object instances, making it particularly suitable for scenarios in which agents must navigate to visually similar yet spatially distinct instances. Experiments demonstrate that our approach is efficient and adapts well to unknown environments, moving toward practical zero-shot instance-image navigation capabilities.

</details>


### [393] [SurgSync: Time-Synchronized Multi-Modal Data Collection Framework and Dataset for Surgical Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06919)
*Haoying Zhou,Chang Liu,Yimeng Wu,Junlin Wu,Zijian Wu,Yu Chung Lee,Sara Martuscelli,Spetimiu E. Salcudean,Gregory S. Fischer,Peter Kazanzides*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SurgSync，一种用于机器人手术的多模态数据采集框架，支持离线与在线同步，旨在解决AI手术系统缺乏高质量训练数据的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人手术系统多依赖人工遥操作，缺乏智能化；而AI发展受限于高质量、大规模手术数据的匮乏。

Method: 设计并实现SurgSync框架，集成双模式同步记录器、高保真立体内窥镜、侧视相机及新型电容式接触传感器，并配套后处理工具箱（如深度估计、光流、高斯热图运动学重投影）；在dVRK平台上开展多技能水平参与者的离体组织用户研究。

Result: 构建了包含214个经验证样本的多任务手术数据集，验证了框架有效性，并利用该数据训练了外科技能评估网络。

Conclusion: SurgSync为机器人手术AI模型提供了可扩展、高保真、多模态的数据采集与处理基础设施，所有软硬件资源已开源。

Abstract: Most existing robotic surgery systems adopt a human-in-the-loop paradigm, often with the surgeon directly teleoperating the robotic system. Adding intelligence to these robots would enable higher-level control, such as supervised autonomy or even full autonomy. However, artificial intelligence (AI) requires large amounts of training data, which is currently lacking. This work proposes SurgSync, a multi-modal data collection framework with offline and online synchronization to support training and real-time inference, respectively. The framework is implemented on a da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) and introduces (1) dual-mode (online/offline-matching) synchronized recorders, (2) a modern stereo endoscope to achieve image quality on par with clinical systems, and (3) additional sensors such as a side-view camera and a novel capacitive contact sensor to provide ground truth contact data. The framework also incorporates a post-processing toolbox for tasks such as depth estimation, optical flow, and a practical kinematic reprojection method using Gaussian heatmap. User studies with participants of varying skill levels are performed with ex-vivo tissue to provide clinically realistic data, and a network for surgical skill assessment is employed to demonstrate utilization of the collected data. Through the user study experiments, we obtained a dataset of 214 validated instances across multiple canonical training tasks. All software and data are available at surgsync.github.io.

</details>


### [394] [CN-CBF: Composite Neural Control Barrier Function for Safe Robot Navigation in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06921)
*Bojan Derajić,Sebastian Bernhard,Wolfgang Hönig*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于复合神经控制屏障函数（CBF）的安全导航方法，结合Hamilton-Jacobi可达性理论与残差神经网络架构，提升动态环境中机器人避障成功率，实验显示成功率提升达18%，且不增加运动保守性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习和模型的CBF设计方法存在设计困难、泛化性差或保守性强等问题，难以兼顾安全性与灵活性。

Method: 提出复合神经CBF设计方法：多个神经CBF分别建模单个移动障碍物的最优安全集，并通过残差神经网络结构确保估计安全集不与失效集相交。

Result: 在仿真中，相比最优基线方法，任务成功率提升最高达18%，且未增加运动保守性；硬件实验成功验证于地面机器人与四旋翼平台。

Conclusion: 该方法在保证安全性的同时提升了动态环境下的导航性能，兼具可部署性与有效性，为神经CBF设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: Safe navigation of autonomous robots remains one of the core challenges in the field, especially in dynamic and uncertain environments. One of the prevalent approaches is safety filtering based on control barrier functions (CBFs), which are easy to deploy but difficult to design. Motivated by the shortcomings of existing learning- and model-based methods, we propose a simple yet effective neural CBF design method for safe robot navigation in dynamic environments. We employ the idea of a composite CBF, where multiple neural CBFs are combined into a single CBF. The individual CBFs are trained via the Hamilton-Jacobi reachability framework to approximate the optimal safe set for single moving obstacles. Additionally, we use the residual neural architecture, which guarantees that the estimated safe set does not intersect with the corresponding failure set. The method is extensively evaluated in simulation experiments for a ground robot and a quadrotor, comparing it against several baseline methods. The results show improved success rates of up to 18\% compared to the best baseline, without increasing the conservativeness of the motion. Also, the method is demonstrated in hardware experiments for both types of robots.

</details>


### [395] [LIPP: Load-Aware Informative Path Planning with Physical Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06924)
*Hojune Kim,Guangyao Shi,Gaurav S. Sukhatme*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了负载感知的信息路径规划（LIPP），扩展了经典信息路径规划（C-IPP），显式建模采样质量对后续移动能耗的影响，并以混合整数二次规划（MIQP）形式联合优化路径、访问顺序与各点采样数量，在能量预算约束下提升能效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典IPP假设测量不改变机器人状态，仅考虑路径距离成本；但在物理采样任务中，样本质量增加会提高后续运动能耗，忽略该耦合会导致能量利用低效。

Method: 提出LIPP框架，建立负载依赖的能耗模型，将其建模为带能量约束的混合整数二次规划（MIQP），联合优化路径、访问顺序和各点采样数量。

Result: 理论证明LIPP严格推广C-IPP（当样本单位质量λ→0时退化为C-IPP）；推导了LIPP相对C-IPP的路径长度增长上界；2000组仿真表明LIPP在零质量时行为与C-IPP一致，且随样本质量增加显著提升单位能量的不确定性降低效率。

Conclusion: LIPP通过显式建模采样负载与能耗的耦合关系，实现了更优的能量效率和数据采集性能，是C-IPP在物理采样场景下的自然且严格的推广。

Abstract: In classical Informative Path Planning (C-IPP), robots are typically modeled as mobile sensors that acquire digital measurements such as images or radiation levels. In this model - since making a measurement leaves the robot's physical state unchanged - traversal costs are determined solely by the path taken. This is a natural assumption for many missions, but does not extend to settings involving physical sample collection, where each collected sample adds mass and increases the energy cost of all subsequent motion. As a result, IPP formulations that ignore this coupling between information gain and load-dependent traversal cost can produce plans that are distance-efficient but energy-suboptimal, collecting fewer samples and less data than the energy budget would permit. In this paper, we introduce Load-aware Informative Path Planning (LIPP ), a generalization of C-IPP that explicitly models this coupling and the resulting order-dependent traversal costs. We formulate LIPP as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) that jointly optimizes routing, visitation order, and per-location sampling count under an energy budget. We show that LIPP strictly generalizes C-IPP: as sample unit mass $λ\to 0$, the load-dependent energy model reduces exactly to the classical distance budget constraint, recovering C-IPP as a special case. We further derive theoretical bounds on the path-length increase of LIPP relative to C-IPP, characterizing the trade-off for improved energy efficiency. Finally, through extensive simulations across 2000 diverse mission scenarios, we demonstrate that LIPP matches the behavior of C-IPP at zero sample mass and progressively achieves higher uncertainty reduction per unit energy as sample mass increases.

</details>


### [396] [A Contrastive Fewshot RGBD Traversability Segmentation Framework for Indoor Robotic Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06927)
*Qiyuan An,Tuan Dang,Fillia Makedon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合RGB图像与稀疏1D激光深度信息的少样本室内可通行性分割框架，引入负对比学习分支和两阶段注意力深度模块，显著提升了对细小障碍物（如椅腿）的检测能力，在自建数据集上mIoU提升达9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯视觉模型难以检测细小障碍物（如椅腿），存在安全隐患；同时少样本分割中仅依赖正样本原型易导致过拟合和泛化差。

Method: 提出多模态少样本分割框架：融合RGB与稀疏1D激光深度；设计两阶段注意力深度模块实现跨模态空间对齐；引入负对比学习（NCL）分支，利用负样本（障碍物）原型优化自由空间预测。

Result: 在自建室内RGB-D可通行性数据集上，1-shot和5-shot设置下mIoU均超越SOTA方法，最高提升9%。

Conclusion: 融合稀疏深度与负对比学习能有效提升少样本条件下可通行性分割的鲁棒性与精度，尤其改善对挑战性细小障碍物的识别。

Abstract: Indoor traversability segmentation aims to identify safe, navigable free space for autonomous agents, which is critical for robotic navigation. Pure vision-based models often fail to detect thin obstacles, such as chair legs, which can pose serious safety risks. We propose a multi-modal segmentation framework that leverages RGB images and sparse 1D laser depth information to capture geometric interactions and improve the detection of challenging obstacles. To reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, we adopt the few-shot segmentation (FSS) paradigm, enabling the model to generalize from limited annotated examples. Traditional FSS methods focus solely on positive prototypes, often leading to overfitting to the support set and poor generalization. To address this, we introduce a negative contrastive learning (NCL) branch that leverages negative prototypes (obstacles) to refine free-space predictions. Additionally, we design a two-stage attention depth module to align 1D depth vectors with RGB images both horizontally and vertically. Extensive experiments on our custom-collected indoor RGB-D traversability dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art FSS and RGB-D segmentation baselines, achieving up to 9\% higher mIoU under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings. These results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging negative prototypes and sparse depth for robust and efficient traversability segmentation.

</details>


### [397] [Failure Mechanisms and Risk Estimation for Legged Robot Locomotion on Granular Slopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06928)
*Xingjue Liao,Feifei Qian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了六足机器人在颗粒斜坡（如沙丘）上的运动性能，通过实验测量发现斜坡角度增加会显著降低剪切阻力，但对法向穿透阻力影响较小；基于此提出了一种简化的机器人-地形交互模型，揭示了性能下降主要源于锚定延迟和后滑增加，而非过度下陷，并构建了失效相图以定量评估风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 颗粒斜坡（如沙丘）上腿式机器人的运动仍面临根本性挑战，源于颗粒介质剪切强度降低及重力引起的各向异性屈服。

Method: 使用六足机器人在可倾斜颗粒床面上系统测量运动速度及坡度相关的法向和剪切颗粒阻力；基于实验数据建立简单机器人-地形交互模型，预测锚定时机、步长和速度；进一步推广模型构建失效相图。

Result: 发现剪切阻力随坡度增大而显著下降，法向阻力几乎不变；模型表明性能损失主因是锚定延迟和后滑增加；成功构建了区分沉陷型与滑移型失效的相图。

Conclusion: 该物理信息驱动框架能预测颗粒斜坡上的失效机制，为变形斜坡上更安全、更鲁棒的机器人作业提供理论指导。

Abstract: Locomotion on granular slopes such as sand dunes remains a fundamental challenge for legged robots due to reduced shear strength and gravity-induced anisotropic yielding of granular media. Using a hexapedal robot on a tiltable granular bed, we systematically measure locomotion speed together with slope-dependent normal and shear granular resistive forces. While normal penetration resistance remains nearly unchanged with inclination, shear resistance decreases substantially as slope angle increases. Guided by these measurements, we develop a simple robot-terrain interaction model that predicts anchoring timing, step length, and resulting robot speed, as functions of terrain strength and slope angle. The model reveals that slope-induced performance loss is primarily governed by delayed anchoring and increased backward slip rather than excessive sinkage. By extending the model to generalized terrain conditions, we construct failure phase diagrams that identify sinkage- and slippage-induced failure regimes, enabling quantitative risk estimation for locomotion on granular slopes. This physics-informed framework provides predictive insight into terrain-dependent failure mechanisms and offers guidance for safer and more robust robot operation on deformable inclines.

</details>


### [398] [Feasibility Restoration under Conflicting STL Specifications with Pareto-Optimal Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06947)
*Tianhao Wu,Yiwei Lyu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段框架，用于解决信号时序逻辑（STL）约束下模型预测控制（MPC）在冲突规格下的不可行问题：先通过最小松弛恢复可行性，再以价值感知的多目标优化进行精炼，并用ε-约束法近似Pareto前沿，支持权衡分析与反事实推理；在自动驾驶案例中验证了其避免死锁和提升可解释决策的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: STL约束的MPC在现实应用中常因安全规则、交通法规与任务目标相互冲突而变得不可行，导致保守行为（如停车），增加安全风险。

Method: 提出统一的两阶段框架：第一阶段通过最小松弛恢复可行性；第二阶段将可行解建模为价值感知的多目标优化问题，并采用ε-约束法近似Pareto前沿。

Result: 该方法在自动驾驶案例中成功避免了由冲突STL规格引起的死锁，并支持对竞争目标间的权衡分析及替代动作的反事实分析。

Conclusion: 所提框架能有效处理STL约束冲突，提升MPC在安全关键场景中的可行性与决策可解释性。

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is expressive formal language that specifies spatio-temporal requirements in robotics. Its quantitative robustness semantics can be easily integrated with optimization-based control frameworks. However, STL specifications may become conflicting in real-world applications, where safety rules, traffic regulations, and task objectives can be cannot be satisfied together. In these situations, traditional STL-constrained Model Predictive Control (MPC) becomes infeasible and default to conservative behaviors such as freezing, which can largely increase risks in safety-critical scenarios. In this paper, we proposes a unified two-stage framework that first restores feasibility via minimal relaxation, then refine the feasible solution by formulating it as a value-aware multi-objective optimization problem. Using $\varepsilon$-constraint method, we approximate the Pareto front of the multi-objective optimization, which allows analysis of tradeoffs among competing objectives and counterfactual analysis of alternative actions. We demonstrate that the proposed approach avoids deadlock under conflicting STL specifications and enables interpretable decision-making in safety-critical applications by conducting a case study in autonomous driving.

</details>


### [399] [Is Your Safe Controller Actually Safe? A Critical Review of CBF Tautologies and Hidden Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06954)
*Taekyung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本教程批判性地回顾了控制屏障函数（CBFs）在机器人安全中的实际应用，指出了理论假设与实际构造之间的差距，并提供了构建可实现安全论证的实用指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理论上的CBF基础虽已成熟，但其在具有输入约束的系统中构造安全控制器的实际可行性仍存在显著差距，亟需厘清候选CBF与有效CBF的区别及其适用条件。

Method: 通过分析系统动力学、执行器限制和类-K函数之间的相互作用，区分候选CBF与有效CBF；借助低维示例揭示CBF在不同系统中的有效性边界；提出针对非被动安全系统的可实现安全论证构建方法。

Result: 明确了CBF在单积分器或运动学机械臂等被动安全系统中易被误用，在具输入约束的真实系统中需谨慎设计；提供了实用指南与开源交互式网页演示以支持理解与应用。

Conclusion: CBF的安全保证高度依赖于系统特性与建模精度，仅依赖几何硬约束或理想化模型不足以确保真实机器人系统的安全性；必须结合具体物理约束进行严谨的安全论证设计。

Abstract: This tutorial provides a critical review of the practical application of Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) in robotic safety. While the theoretical foundations of CBFs are well-established, I identify a recurring gap between the mathematical assumption of a safe controller's existence and its constructive realization in systems with input constraints. I highlight the distinction between candidate and valid CBFs by analyzing the interplay of system dynamics, actuation limits, and class-K functions. I further show that some purported demonstrations of safe robot policies or controllers are limited to passively safe systems, such as single integrators or kinematic manipulators, where safety is already inherited from the underlying physics and even naive geometric hard constraints suffice to prevent collisions. By revisiting simple low-dimensional examples, I show when CBF formulations provide valid safety guarantees and when they fail due to common misuses. I then provide practical guidelines for constructing realizable safety arguments for systems without such passive safety. The goal of this tutorial is to bridge the gap between theoretical guarantees and actual implementation, supported by an open-source interactive web demonstration that visualizes these concepts intuitively.

</details>


### [400] [Energy-Efficient Collaborative Transport of Tether-Suspended Payloads via Rotating Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06955)
*Eric Foss,Andrew Tai,Carlo Bosio,Mark W. Mueller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于旋转平衡的协同空中运输方法，利用离心力提供水平系绳张力，使多旋翼仅需产生纯垂直推力，从而降低能耗，相比静态平衡可节省高达20%的功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统协同空中运输受限于空间、功率和重量，且静态平衡下多旋翼需倾斜产生水平推力以维持编队，导致显著能量损耗；紧凑系绳构型又带来碰撞风险或系绳过长问题。

Method: 引入旋转平衡概念，让系绳悬挂飞行系统保持稳定圆周运动，利用离心力提供所需水平系绳张力，使各四旋翼仅需输出纯垂直推力。

Result: 实验与分析表明，该旋转平衡方案相较静态提升方式最高可降低20%的功耗，并支持更广泛的系绳构型而不牺牲效率。

Conclusion: 旋转平衡是一种更高效、更灵活的协同空中运输策略，提升了该技术的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Collaborative aerial transportation of tethered payloads is fundamentally limited by space, power, and weight constraints. Conventional approaches rely on static equilibrium conditions, where each vehicle tilts to generate the forces that ensure they maintain a formation geometry that avoids aerodynamic interactions and collision. This horizontal thrust component represents a significant energy penalty compared to the ideal case in which each vehicle produces purely vertical thrust to lift the payload. Operating in tighter tether configurations can minimize this effect, but at the cost of either having to fly the vehicles in closer proximity, which risks collision, or significantly increasing the length of the tether, which increases complexity and reduces potential use-cases. We propose operating the tether-suspended flying system at a rotating equilibrium. By maintaining steady circular motion, centrifugal forces provide the necessary horizontal tether tension, allowing each quadrotor to generate purely vertical thrust and thus reducing the total force (and power) required compared to an equilibrium where the thrusts are not vertical. It also allows for a wider range of tether configurations to be used without sacrificing efficiency. Results demonstrate that rotating equilibria can reduce power consumption relative to static lifting by up to 20%, making collaborative aerial solutions more practically relevant.

</details>


### [401] [VSL-Skin: Individually Addressable Phase-Change Voxel Skin for Variable-Stiffness and Virtual Joints Bridging Soft and Rigid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06979)
*Zihan Oliver Zeng,Jiajun An,Preston Luk,Upinder Kaur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为可变刚度晶格皮肤（VSL-Skin）的新型软体机器人结构，首次实现厘米级精度、体素级独立寻址的刚度调控，支持多模态刚度调节、大变形压缩、自主热循环自修复及可编程虚拟关节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体机器人柔顺但承力差，刚性机器人强健但适应性差；现有变刚度系统空间分辨率低，难以实现精细形态控制与虚拟关节灵活布置。

Method: 设计并实现了基于相变材料的可变刚度晶格皮肤（VSL-Skin），采用行列式寻址架构，结合闭式设计模型与有限元分析，支持体素级热激活、刚度模式预测合成与裁剪后功能保持。

Result: 实现轴向/剪切/弯曲/扭转刚度跨近两个数量级调节（如轴向15–1200 N/mm），30%轴向压缩不破坏结构，75秒热切换周期，裁剪后仍保持地址性，并验证六类可编程虚拟关节及自主热循环自修复能力。

Conclusion: VSL-Skin将形态智能确立为可工程化系统属性，为自主可重构机器人提供了通用、平台无关的硬件基础。

Abstract: Soft robots are compliant but often cannot support loads or hold their shape, while rigid robots provide structural strength but are less adaptable. Existing variable-stiffness systems usually operate at the scale of whole segments or patches, which limits precise control over stiffness distribution and virtual joint placement. This paper presents the Variable Stiffness Lattice Skin (VSL-Skin), the first system to enable individually addressable voxel-level morphological control with centimeter-scale precision. The system provides three main capabilities: nearly two orders of magnitude stiffness modulation across axial (15-1200 N/mm), shear (45-850 N/mm), bending (8*10^2 - 3*10^4 N/deg), and torsional modes with centimeter-scale spatial control; the first demonstrated 30% axial compression in phase-change systems while maintaining structural integrity; and autonomous component-level self-repair through thermal cycling, which eliminates fatigue accumulation and enables programmable sacrificial joints for predictable failure management. Selective voxel activation creates six canonical virtual joint types with programmable compliance while preserving structural integrity in non-activated regions. The platform incorporates closed-form design models and finite element analysis for predictive synthesis of stiffness patterns and joint placement. Experimental validation demonstrates 30% axial contraction, thermal switching in 75-second cycles, and cut-to-fit integration that preserves addressability after trimming. The row-column architecture enables platform-agnostic deployment across diverse robotic systems without specialized infrastructure. This framework establishes morphological intelligence as an engineerable system property and advances autonomous reconfigurable robotics.

</details>


### [402] [Foundational World Models Accurately Detect Bimanual Manipulator Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06987)
*Isaac R. Ward,Michelle Ho,Houjun Liu,Aaron Feldman,Joseph Vincent,Liam Kruse,Sean Cheong,Duncan Eddy,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Mac Schwager*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于概率性、历史感知的世界模型与共形预测相结合的实时监控方法，用于检测双臂操作机器人在复杂任务中的异常失败，显著提升了故障检测率并大幅降低参数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模部署视觉运动机器人面临异常失效风险，而双臂操作机器人状态空间高维复杂，难以显式定义所有失效模式。

Method: 在预训练视觉基础模型（NVIDIA Cosmos Tokenizer）的压缩潜在空间中训练概率性、历史感知的世界模型，输出预测不确定性作为共形预测中的非一致性分数，构建运行时监控器以关联高不确定性与异常失效。

Result: 在Push-T仿真环境和新提出的双臂电缆操作数据集（含多视角图像、本体感知信号及真实标注失效）上验证，相较异常检测与分布外检测基线显著提升；参数量仅为次优学习方法的1/20，故障检测率反而高出3.8%。

Conclusion: 该方法为高可靠性要求的真实世界操纵机器人安全部署提供了高效、轻量且鲁棒的异常监控解决方案。

Abstract: Deploying visuomotor robots at scale is challenging due to the potential for anomalous failures to degrade performance, cause damage, or endanger human life. Bimanual manipulators are no exception; these robots have vast state spaces comprised of high-dimensional images and proprioceptive signals. Explicitly defining failure modes within such state spaces is infeasible. In this work, we overcome these challenges by training a probabilistic, history informed, world model within the compressed latent space of a pretrained vision foundation model (NVIDIA's Cosmos Tokenizer). The model outputs uncertainty estimates alongside its predictions that serve as non-conformity scores within a conformal prediction framework. We use these scores to develop a runtime monitor, correlating periods of high uncertainty with anomalous failures. To test these methods, we use the simulated Push-T environment and the Bimanual Cable Manipulation dataset, the latter of which we introduce in this work. This new dataset features trajectories with multiple synchronized camera views, proprioceptive signals, and annotated failures from a challenging data center maintenance task. We benchmark our methods against baselines from the anomaly detection and out-of-distribution detection literature, and show that our approach considerably outperforms statistical techniques. Furthermore, we show that our approach requires approximately one twentieth of the trainable parameters as the next-best learning-based approach, yet outperforms it by 3.8% in terms of failure detection rate, paving the way toward safely deploying manipulator robots in real-world environments where reliability is non-negotiable.

</details>


### [403] [Two-Stage Path Following for Mobile Manipulators via Dimensionality-Reduced Graph Search and Numerical Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07003)
*Fuyu Guo,Yuting Mei,Yuyao Zhang,Qian Tang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段配置规划框架，用于解决移动机械臂高效路径跟踪问题：第一阶段基于IRM构建多层图并用Dijkstra动态规划求解初始可行路径；第二阶段将可行基座区域转换为凸包，并用L-BFGS进行连续优化以提升平滑性并满足可达性约束。仿真与实物实验均验证了其亚毫米级精度和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高效路径跟踪常受限于高维构型空间和运动学约束，需兼顾计算效率、全局最优性与实际可达性。

Method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段利用IRM离散任务空间路径构建多层图，采用Dijkstra动态规划提取初始可行路径；第二阶段将可行基座区域建模为凸包，通过L-BFGS进行连续优化，在满足可达性约束前提下最大化轨迹平滑性。

Result: 仿真中达到亚毫米级运动学精度；实物实验在全向移动机械臂上验证了框架的鲁棒性与实用性。

Conclusion: 该两阶段框架有效解耦8-DoF规划问题，在保证理论精度的同时提升了计算效率与实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Efficient path following for mobile manipulators is often hindered by high-dimensional configuration spaces and kinematic constraints. This paper presents a robust two-stage configuration planning framework that decouples the 8-DoF planning problem into a tractable 2-DoF base optimization under a yaw-fixed base planning assumption. In the first stage, the proposed approach utilizes IRM to discretize the task-space path into a multi-layer graph, where an initial feasible path is extracted via a Dijkstra-based dynamic programming approach to ensure computational efficiency and global optimality within the discretized graph. In the second stage, to overcome discrete search quantization, feasible base regions are transformed into convex hulls, enabling subsequent continuous refinement via the L-BFGS algorithm to maximize trajectory smoothness while strictly enforcing reachability constraints. Simulation results demonstrate the theoretical precision of the proposed method by achieving sub-millimeter kinematic accuracy in simulation, and physical experiments on an omnidirectional mobile manipulator further validate the framework's robustness and practical applicability.

</details>


### [404] [SSP: Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy via Joint Optimization of Behavioral and Spatial Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07032)
*Jianshu Hu,ZhiYuan Guan,Lei Song,Kantaphat Leelakunwet,Hesheng Wang,Wei Xiao,Qi Dou,Yutong Ban*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SSP的安全保障外科手术策略框架，结合Neural ODE建模与CBF安全控制器，在保证任务性能的同时实现形式化安全约束，验证于仿真与真实dVRK平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习或模仿学习的手术机器人策略缺乏形式化安全保证，难以满足临床部署要求。

Method: 提出SSP框架：利用Neural ODE学习不确定性感知的动力学模型，并以此构建鲁棒控制屏障函数（CBF）安全控制器，对RL/IL/CLF策略的动作进行最小干预以满足行为与空间两类安全约束。

Result: 在SurRoL仿真和dVRK真实平台上验证，约束违反率接近零，同时保持高任务成功率。

Conclusion: SSP成功弥合了数据驱动策略的通用性与形式化安全性之间的鸿沟，为临床自主手术机器人提供了可行的安全增强路径。

Abstract: The paradigm of robot-assisted surgery is shifting toward data-driven autonomy, where policies learned via Reinforcement Learning (RL) or Imitation Learning (IL) enable the execution of complex tasks. However, these ``black-box" policies often lack formal safety guarantees, a critical requirement for clinical deployment. In this paper, we propose the Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy (SSP) framework to bridge the gap between data-driven generality and formal safety. We utilize Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs) to learn an uncertainty-aware dynamics model from demonstration data. This learned model underpins a robust Control Barrier Function (CBF) safety controller, which minimally alters the actions of a surgical policy to ensure strict safety under uncertainty. Our controller enforces two constraint categories: behavioral constraints (restricting the task space of the agent) and spatial constraints (defining surgical no-go zones). We instantiate the SSP framework with surgical policies derived from RL, IL and Control Lyapunov Functions (CLF). Validation on in both the SurRoL simulation and da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) demonstrates that our method achieves a near-zero constraint violation rate while maintaining high task success rates compared to unconstrained baselines.

</details>


### [405] [TacDexGrasp: Compliant and Robust Dexterous Grasping with Tactile Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07040)
*Yubin Ke,Jiayi Chen,Hang Lv,Xiao Zhou,He Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于触觉反馈和二阶锥规划（SOCP）的多指手抓取控制方法，通过约束各接触点切向与法向力之比低于估计摩擦系数，无需显式建模扭矩或检测滑移，即可同时抑制平移和旋转滑移，实验证明其对12种不同物体具有鲁棒性和顺应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多指手虽具备顺应、鲁棒抓取未知物体的潜力，但其高维力控制面临挑战，特别是需同时抵抗重力引起的平移滑移和质心偏置导致的旋转滑移。

Method: 利用触觉反馈，设计基于二阶锥规划（SOCP）的控制器；核心思想是利用旋转滑移必然引发某些接触点平移滑移的特性，并以各接触点切向/法向力比值作为早期稳定性指标，将其主动约束在估计摩擦系数以下。

Result: 在真实世界中对12种不同物体进行实验，验证了该方法在保持抓取稳定的同时具备良好的鲁棒性与顺应性。

Conclusion: 仅通过约束各接触点摩擦锥内力比即可有效防止平移与旋转滑移，无需显式扭矩建模或滑移检测，为多指手高维力控制提供了简洁而有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-fingered hands offer great potential for compliant and robust grasping of unknown objects, yet their high-dimensional force control presents a significant challenge. This work addresses two key problems: (1) distributing forces across multiple contacts to counteract an object's weight, and (2) preventing rotational slip caused by gravitational torque when a grasp is distant from the object's center of mass. We address these challenges via tactile feedback and a Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP)-based controller, without explicit torque modeling or slip detection. Our key insights are (1) rotational slip inevitably induces translational slip at some contact points for a multi-fingered grasp, and (2) the ratio of tangential to normal force at each contact is an effective early stability indicator. By actively constraining this ratio for each finger below the estimated friction coefficient, our controller maintains grasp stability against both translational and rotational slip. Real-world experiments on 12 diverse objects demonstrate the robustness and compliance of our approach.

</details>


### [406] [GuideTWSI: A Diverse Tactile Walking Surface Indicator Dataset from Synthetic and Real-World Images for Blind and Low-Vision Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07060)
*Hochul Hwang,Soowan Yang,Anh N. H. Nguyen,Parth Goel,Krisha Adhikari,Sunghoon I. Lee,Joydeep Biswas,Nicholas A. Giudice,Donghyun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文指出了当前TWSI（触觉行走表面指示器）数据集存在视角缺失、地理偏差及类型覆盖不全的问题，导致模型在跨区域、跨类型场景下泛化能力差，影响盲人及低视力人群的导航安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TWSI对盲人及低视力（BLV）行人至关重要，但现有城市感知数据集中TWSI标注严重不足，且专用铺装数据集存在视角局限（缺乏机器人相关视角）和地理偏差（仅聚焦东亚条形TWSI），忽视了欧美广泛使用的截顶圆 dome 型TWSI，造成模型泛化失败。

Method: 通过与BLV导盲犬使用者、训犬师及定向行走（O&M）专家的实地观察与访谈，确认TWSI精准分割对导航辅助的关键性，并系统分析现有数据集在视角、地域和形态类型上的缺陷。

Result: 揭示了当前TWSI数据集的三大局限：规模小、视角缺失（如第一人称/俯视）、地理与形态偏置（重条形轻圆 dome），并指出由此导致模型在 dome 场景中漏检与误停。

Conclusion: 亟需构建多视角、多地域、多形态（兼顾条形与圆 dome）的大规模TWSI标注数据集，以提升模型在真实复杂环境中的鲁棒性与安全性。

Abstract: Tactile Walking Surface Indicators (TWSIs) are safety-critical landmarks that blind and low-vision (BLV) pedestrians use to locate crossings and hazard zones. From our observation sessions with BLV guide dog handlers, trainers, and an O&M specialist, we confirmed the critical importance of reliable and accurate TWSI segmentation for navigation assistance of BLV individuals. Achieving such reliability requires large-scale annotated data. However, TWSIs are severely underrepresented in existing urban perception datasets, and even existing dedicated paving datasets are limited: they lack robot-relevant viewpoints (e.g., egocentric or top-down) and are geographically biased toward East Asian directional bars - raised parallel strips used for continuous guidance along sidewalks. This narrow focus overlooks truncated domes - rows of round bumps used primarily in North America and Europe as detectable warnings at curbs, crossings, and platform edges. As a result, models trained only on bar-centric data struggle to generalize to dome-based warnings, leading to missed detections and false stops in safety-critical environments.

</details>


### [407] [Morphology-Independent Facial Expression Imitation for Human-Face Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07068)
*Xu Chen,Rui Gao,Che Sun,Zhehang Liu,Yuwei Wu,Shuo Yang,Yunde Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种形态无关的面部表情模仿方法，通过解耦表情语义与面部形态，提升人形机器人面部表情模仿的真实感和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于2D关键点映射的方法易受个体面部形态干扰，导致表情模仿性能下降。

Method: 构建表情解耦模块（自监督学习分离表情与形态表征）和表情迁移模块（以感知表情误差为学习目标映射至机器人执行器指令）。

Result: 在自研高表现力人形机器人Pengrui上验证，能有效复现广泛的人类表情；代码与机器人实现细节将开源。

Conclusion: 所提形态无关方法显著提升了人形机器人面部表情模仿的真实性与泛化能力。

Abstract: Accurate facial expression imitation on human-face robots is crucial for achieving natural human-robot interaction. Most existing methods have achieved photorealistic expression imitation through mapping 2D facial landmarks to a robot's actuator commands. Their imitation of landmark trajectories is susceptible to interference from facial morphology, which would lead to a performance drop. In this paper, we propose a morphology-independent expression imitation method that decouples expressions from facial morphology to eliminate morphological influence and produce more realistic expressions for human-face robots. Specifically, we construct an expression decoupling module to learn expression semantics by disentangling the expression representation from the morphology representation in a self-supervised manner. We devise an expression transfer module to map the representations to the robot's actuator commands through a learning objective of perceiving expression errors, producing accurate facial expressions based on the learned expression semantics. To support experimental validation, a custom-designed and highly expressive human-face robot, namely Pengrui, is developed to serve as an experimental platform for realistic expression imitation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables the human-face robot to reproduce a wide range of human-like expressions effectively. All code and implementation details of the robot will be released.

</details>


### [408] [The Talking Robot: Distortion-Robust Acoustic Models for Robot-Robot Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07072)
*Hanlong Li,Karishma Kamalahasan,Jiahui Li,Kazuhiro Nakadai,Shreyas Kousik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Artoo 是一种为机器人设计的端到端学习型声学通信系统，用联合训练的轻量级TTS发射器和Conformer ASR接收器替代传统信号处理，在低信噪比下实现高鲁棒性语音传输，仅需2.1M参数且可在CPU上实时运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人间通信无需保留人类语音的音色、韵律或自然性，而应专注于在信道失真下最大化解码准确率；现有手工设计信号处理方法难以兼顾鲁棒性与资源效率。

Method: 提出Artoo系统，包含1.18M参数的轻量TTS发射器与938K参数的Conformer ASR接收器，通过可微信道联合优化，并采用三阶段协同训练课程提升抗噪能力。

Result: 在0 dB SNR下达到8.3%字符错误率（CER），优于基线；整套系统仅2.1M参数（8.4 MB），CPU端到端延迟低于13 ms。

Conclusion: Artoo验证了端到端学习在资源受限机器人声学通信中的有效性，为低功耗、高鲁棒性机间通信提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present Artoo, a learned acoustic communication system for robots that replaces hand-designed signal processing with end-to-end co-trained neural networks. Our system pairs a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) transmitter (1.18M parameters) with a conformer-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) receiver (938K parameters), jointly optimized through a differentiable channel. Unlike human speech, robot-to-robot communication is paralinguistics-free: the system need not preserve timbre, prosody, or naturalness, only maximize decoding accuracy under channel distortion. Through a three-phase co-training curriculum, the TTS transmitter learns to produce distortion-robust acoustic encodings that surpass the baseline under noise, achieving 8.3% CER at 0 dB SNR. The entire system requires only 2.1M parameters (8.4 MB) and runs in under 13 ms end-to-end on a CPU, making it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained robotic platforms.

</details>


### [409] [VLN-Cache: Enabling Token Caching for VLN Models with Visual/Semantic Dynamics Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07080)
*Zihao Zheng,Zhihao Mao,Xingyue Zhou,Jiayu Chen,Maoliang Li,Xinhao Sun,Hailong Zou,Zhaobo Zhang,Xuanzhe Liu,Donggang Cao,Hong Mei,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VLN-Cache，一种面向视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务的动态感知视觉token缓存框架，解决现有缓存方法在视角变化和语义变化下的失效问题，实现推理加速而不显著损失性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有token缓存方法假设静态相机和固定语义焦点，但VLN中存在视角变化（视觉动力学）和任务阶段演进导致的语义相关性变化（语义动力学），使传统缓存失效。

Method: 提出VLN-Cache框架：1）视图对齐重映射（view-aligned remapping）以恢复几何对应关系；2）任务相关显著性滤波器（task-relevance saliency filter）在语义转换时阻止缓存复用；3）层自适应熵策略（layer-adaptive entropy policy）动态分配各层缓存预算。

Result: 在R2R-CE仿真基准上实现最高1.52倍推理加速，同时保持有竞争力的导航成功率。

Conclusion: VLN-Cache通过联合建模视觉与语义动态性，显著提升大模型在VLN任务中的缓存有效性与实时性，为真实场景部署提供可行路径。

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) increasingly relies on large vision-language models, but their inference cost conflicts with real-time deployment. Token caching is a promising training-free strategy that avoids redundant computation by reusing stable visual tokens across frames. However, existing methods assume a static camera and fixed semantic focus, assumptions that VLN fundamentally violates. We identify two failure modes: (1) visual dynamics, where viewpoint shift displaces token positions across frames, causing position-wise matching to pair misaligned content; (2) semantic dynamics, where token relevance shifts across task stages as navigation progresses, making cached states stale. We propose VLN-Cache, a visual-dynamic-aware and semantic-dynamic-aware caching framework that introduces view-aligned remapping to recover geometric correspondences and a task-relevance saliency filter to veto reuse at semantic transitions. A layer-adaptive entropy policy further balances the per-layer reuse budget. Experiments on the R2R-CE simulation benchmark show up to 1.52x speedup while maintaining competitive navigation success rates.

</details>


### [410] [ACLM: ADMM-Based Distributed Model Predictive Control for Collaborative Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07095)
*Ziyi Zhou,Pengyuan Shu,Ruize Cao,Yuntian Zhao,Ye Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于ADMM的分布式模型预测控制框架，用于多四足机器人协同搬运重载荷，兼顾动态耦合与实时性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式规划方法难以扩展到大规模系统，而分层或完全去中心化方法常忽略力与动力学交互，导致行为保守。

Method: 采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）将全局最优控制问题分解为各机器人并行求解的子问题，并引入共识约束；结合力矩感知的全身控制器执行轨迹跟踪。

Result: 在最多四台机器人的仿真中验证了该方法的可扩展性、实时性能及对模型不确定性的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提分布式MPC框架在保证协作动力学精度的同时实现了高效计算，适用于复杂环境中多腿机器人协同搬运任务。

Abstract: Collaborative transportation of heavy payloads via loco-manipulation is a challenging yet essential capability for legged robots operating in complex, unstructured environments. Centralized planning methods, e.g., holistic trajectory optimization, capture dynamic coupling among robots and payloads but scale poorly with system size, limiting real-time applicability. In contrast, hierarchical and fully decentralized approaches often neglect force and dynamic interactions, leading to conservative behavior. This study proposes an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)-based distributed model predictive control framework for collaborative loco-manipulation with a team of quadruped robots with manipulators. By exploiting the payload-induced coupling structure, the global optimal control problem is decomposed into parallel individual-robot-level subproblems with consensus constraints. The distributed planner operates in a receding-horizon fashion and achieves fast convergence, requiring only a few ADMM iterations per planning cycle. A wrench-aware whole-body controller executes the planned trajectories, tracking both motion and interaction wrenches. Extensive simulations with up to four robots demonstrate scalability, real-time performance, and robustness to model uncertainty.

</details>


### [411] [Towards Scalable Probabilistic Human Motion Prediction with Gaussian Processes for Safe Human-Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07096)
*Jinger Chong,Xiaotong Zhang,Kamal Youcef-Toumi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结构化的多任务变分高斯过程（GP）框架，用于全身体运动预测，兼顾准确性与校准良好的不确定性估计，适用于人机协作场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机协作（HRC）中，机器人需实时预测并响应人类运动，因此准确且不确定性校准良好的人体运动预测至关重要。

Method: 提出结构化多任务变分高斯过程框架，引入时间相关性建模、关节维度级因子分解提升可扩展性，并采用连续6D旋转表示以保持运动学一致性。

Result: 在Human3.6M数据集上，KDE NLL比强基线低50%，CRPS达0.021 m；确定性MAE略高于深度学习方法（高3–18%），但参数量仅0.24–0.35M（约为同类方法的1/8），推理延迟低，校准性良好且随预测步长仅有轻微漂移。

Conclusion: 可扩展的GP模型可在保证竞争性精度的同时，提供可靠、可解释的不确定性估计，适用于机器人运动规划与避障等下游任务。

Abstract: Accurate human motion prediction with well-calibrated uncertainty is critical for safe human-robot collaboration (HRC), where robots must anticipate and react to human movements in real time. We propose a structured multitask variational Gaussian Process (GP) framework for full-body human motion prediction that captures temporal correlations and leverages joint-dimension-level factorization for scalability, while using a continuous 6D rotation representation to preserve kinematic consistency.
